description_long: This is a dark-colored trucker cap featuring a structured front panel and a curved brim. The front panel appears to be made of solid fabric, while the sides and back are constructed from a breathable mesh material, providing ventilation. The back of the cap includes an adjustable snapback closure for size customization. The crown is mid-height and rounded, with a subtle diamond-shaped patch or stitched detail on the front. The overall design is utilitarian and casual, suitable for urban environments. The cap's materials and construction suggest it is lightweight and comfortable for everyday wear.
description: A dark trucker cap with a curved brim, mesh back panels, and an adjustable snapback closure. Features a diamond-shaped patch on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved brim, solid front panel, and mesh back panels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the mesh construction and adjustable snapback closure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the brim and mesh panels visible, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the solid front panel and diamond-shaped patch detail.
